zh.lifeSummary: 當Henrich Ludwig Vogelgesang於1644年2月11日出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲茨魏布呂肯時，他的父親Bernard Wolf Vogelgesang37歲，母親Anna Catharina Landorff36歲。他於大約1663年與Cecilia Hüter在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 皮爾馬森斯波頓巴賀結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1704年4月19日在德國薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯格斯海姆賀比海姆享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henrich Ludwig Vogelgesang于1644年2月11日出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲茨魏布呂肯时，他的父亲Bernard Wolf Vogelgesang37岁，母亲Anna Catharina Landorff36岁。他于大约1663年与Cecilia Hüter在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 皮爾馬森斯波頓巴賀结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1704年4月19日在德国薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯格斯海姆賀比海姆享年60岁。

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Vogelsang
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ingo, Kurt, Bernd, Dieter, Erwin, Fritz, Gerhard, Gunther, Joerg, Otto, Willi.
German: habitational name from any of several places called Vogelsang all over Germany; or a topographic name from a field name. Compare   Birdsong  .

nameMeanings.name: Henrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: Ludwig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from hlud ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’; an ancient royal and imperial name. See Louis .

variants.name: Louis
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

en.lifeSummary: When Henrich Ludwig Vogelgesang was born on 11 February 1644, in Zweibrücken, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, his father, Bernard Wolf Vogelgesang, was 37 and his mother, Anna Catharina Landorff, was 36. He married Cecilia Hüter about 1663, in Bottenbach, Pirmasens, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 19 April 1704, in Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germany, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henrich Ludwig Vogelgesang est né le 11 février 1644, à Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Bernard Wolf Vogelgesang, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Anna Catharina Landorff, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Cecilia Hüter environ 1663, à Bottenbach, Landkreis Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 19 avril 1704, à Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, La Sarre, Allemagne, à l’âge de 60 ans.

Februar 1644 in Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bernard Wolf Vogelgesang 37 und seine Mutter Anna Catharina Landorff 36. Er hat um 1663 in Bottenbach, Landkreis Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland Cecilia Hüter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 19. April 1704 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Deutschland.

Lui sposato Cecilia Hüter circa 1663, nel Bottenbach, Landkreis Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 19 aprile 1704, nel Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germania, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henrich Ludwig Vogelgesangが1644年2月11日にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズズウエイブルuクンで生まれた時，父Bernard Wolf Vogelgesangは37歳，母Anna Catharina Landorffは36歳であった。約1663年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス ピルマセンスボッテンバチでCecilia Hüterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1704年4月19日にドイツサアルランドサアルプファルズ-クレイスジャーシェイムハービトズヘイムで60歳で死去した。

ko.Nußdorf, Landau in der Pfalz, Rheinland-: 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜도 인 데르 p팔즈 누ss도르프
ko.lifeSummary: Henrich Ludwig Vogelgesang(이)가 1644년 2월 11일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 즈위브uc켄에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bernard Wolf Vogelgesang(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Catharina Landorff(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1663년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 피마센스 벗텐바치에서 Cecilia Hüter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1704년 4월 19일 독일 사알랜드 사아르p팔즈-크레이스 그르셰임 허비츠하임에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henrich Ludwig Vogelgesang nasceu em 11 de fevereiro de 1644, em Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, seu pai, Bernard Wolf Vogelgesang, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Anna Catharina Landorff, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecilia Hüter aproximadamente 1663, em Bottenbach, Landkreis Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de abril de 1704, em Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemanha, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henrich Ludwig Vogelgesang родился 11 февраля 1644 г. в местности звибрuккен, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, его отцу по имени Bernard Wolf Vogelgesang было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Catharina Landorff, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecilia Hüter около 1663 г. в местности боттенбач, ландкрис пирмеисенс, раинланд-пфалз, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 19 апреля 1704 г. в местности хирбицхим, джиршим, саарпфалз-крис, саарланд, Германия в возрасте 60 лет.

Se casó con Cecilia Hüter aproximadamente 1663, en Bottenbach, Landkreis Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 19 de abril de 1704, en Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemania, a la edad de 60 años.

th.Bliesdalheim, Gersheim, Saar-Pfalz-Kreis: บลีสดาลไฮม, เจอรชีม, ซาารปฟาลซ-กไรส, ซาารแลนด์, ประเทศเยอรมัน
th.Hornbach, Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, De: หอรนบาช, ลันดกไรส ปอิรแมสเอนส, รไฮนแลนด-ปฟาลซ์, ประเทศเยอรมัน
th.Bottenbach, Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz,: โบตเอนบาช, ลันดกไรส ปอิรแมสเอนส, รไฮนแลนด-ปฟาลซ์, ประเทศเยอรมัน
th.Hornbach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland: ซเหวย์บรuกเอน, รไฮนแลนด-ปฟาลซ์, ประเทศเยอรมัน
th.Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschlan: ซเหวย์บรuกเอน, รไฮนแลนด-ปฟาลซ์, ประเทศเยอรมัน
th.Blieserhof, Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saar-: เฮิรบิตจไอม, เจอรชีม, ซาารปฟาลซ-กไรส, ซาารแลนด์, ประเทศเยอรมัน
th.Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saar-Pfalz-Kreis,: เฮิรบิตจไอม, เจอรชีม, ซาารปฟาลซ-กไรส, ซาารแลนด์, ประเทศเยอรมัน
th.Nußdorf, Landau, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutsc: นอูssโดรฟ, ลันดกไรส ลันเดา, รไฮนแลนด-ปฟาลซ์, ประเทศเยอรมัน

to.Nußdorf, Landau in der Pfalz, Rheinland-: Nußdorf, Landau in der Pfalz, Rheinland-Pfalz, Siamane

uk.Nußdorf, Landau in der Pfalz, Rheinland-: нуssдорф, ландау ин дир пфалз, раинланд-пфалз, Німеччина

vi.Nußdorf, Landau in der Pfalz, Rheinland-: Nußdorf, Landau in der Pfalz, Rheinland-Pfalz, Đức
